title: Feature Root: Investigator bead type
description: Shared execution root for delivering the new `investigator` bead type, including runtime registration, output schema support, scheduler exclusions, operator guardrails, validation, documentation, and review.
acceptance_criteria: `investigator` is a supported agent type across runtime and config surfaces without being treated as a mutating agent.
Investigator beads can emit the required structured analysis fields and declare a single report artifact under `docs/investigator/`.
Scheduler followup creation skips investigator beads entirely while normal file-scope conflict handling still applies.
Guardrails and skills constrain investigator work to read-only analysis plus one declared report file.
Regression tests, operator-facing docs, and review cover the combined change set.
